description_long: This is an electric bass guitar with a classic double-cutaway body shape, finished in a sunburst pattern that transitions from a dark edge to a lighter amber center. The body features a glossy black and brown finish, with a white pickguard and a single split-coil pickup visible on the front. The neck is made of light-colored wood, likely maple, and is fitted with dot inlays along the fretboard. The headstock is elongated and slightly asymmetrical, with four tuning pegs arranged in a line, and a visible logo or decal at the top. The back of the guitar shows a smooth, contoured body with a continuation of the sunburst finish and a bolt-on neck joint. Metal hardware, including the bridge, tuning pegs, and control knobs, is present, contributing to the instrument's functional and aesthetic appeal.
description: A sunburst-finished electric bass guitar with a double-cutaway body, white pickguard, and four inline tuning pegs. Features a maple neck, split-coil pickup, and glossy hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, white pickguard, split-coil pickup, control knobs, and four-string layout.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and the protruding tuning pegs on the headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the contoured sunburst back, bolt-on neck joint, and absence of pickguard or electronics.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the neck's thickness and the alignment of the tuning pegs.
attribute_headstock_design: Elongated, asymmetrical headstock with four inline tuning pegs and a visible logo at the top
